default_rubric: Score 0-1. Output must: (1) classify category correctly based on ticket content, (2) assign appropriate priority, (3) include brief factual summary, (4) avoid hallucinations or refusals.

input.text: Customer is unable to process payment. Credit card keeps getting declined even though they have sufficient funds.

cases.rubric: Score 0-1. Must classify as billing with high priority. Summary must mention payment/credit card issue. No hallucinations.

input.text: Getting API timeout errors on checkout endpoint. Returns 504 after 30 seconds. Started happening after yesterday's deploy.

cases.rubric: Score 0-1. Must classify as technical with medium/high priority. Summary must reference API/timeout issue.

input.text: User wants to update their email address from old@example.com to new@example.com. No urgency.
Customer says app is slow when processing payments.

cases.rubric: Score 0-1. Could be technical OR billing. Either is acceptable if reasoning is sound. Must assign priority and avoid refusals.
